title: GenoMons [Cobblemon]
description: Another addon adding a bunch more Pokemon to cobblemon, but this time its from me
body:
![Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86a8d8a28208407f8ebb63880adc84024a63ebc4.png)

An addon that brings 40+ new additions to cobblemon

---

![New Pokemon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd8b5c4beb0db51ae3b09a386756a1aa6c40f0a0.png)

This addon adds A variety of new pokemon, including

- Delibird
- Orthworm
- Hawlucha
- The Toedscool Line
- The Darumaka Line
- The Frigibax Line

Along with a Couple of New **Legendaries**

- **Desolate Lands** and **Primordial Seas** Clash as Groudon And kyogre come to cobblemon
- The Gaurdian of MeleMele Island Comes to cobblemon, tapu-koko makes its appearance
- In the lava lakes of the nether, the stakes have been unearthed and Chi-Yu has been released
- The horrors of the mind and starlight dreams are here, darkrai and cresselia have come to genomons
- In the ruins of a desert temple, magnificent gold rings appear, Hoopa has been awakened
- Through the depths of ultra space, an ominous prescense appears to steal any light it finds, Necrozma has traveled across ultra space to come to genomons
- in the depths of area zero, metalic titans clash, as iron valiant and iron thorns have come to genomons

---

![Remodels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/304d6d09b1ee3bbcd8be28a71f3a883f012b02bd.png)

Amongst all the new Pokemon, some other pokemon have changed appearance into a more refined form, including

- Venusaur
- The Charmander Line
- The Squirtle Line
- The Birds Of ice, thunder, and fire: Articuno, Zapdos, And moltres
- The Perfect Lifeform, Created in a now Destroyed Lab: Mewtwo

---

![New Forms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2f81bb9f826a0bb97aa6e1d3d3c9603438915f1.png)

The addon adds a total of 12 new forms to cobblemon, which include

- Alolan Grimer and muk
- Hisuian Growlithe and arcanine
- Galarian Darumaka And Darmanitan
- Zen Mode for both forms of Darmanitan
- The birds of freezing glares, Thunderous Kicks, and Scorching hellfires: the galarian Legendary Birds
- The Bloodmoon Beast said to have come from a far away land: Bloodmoon Ursaluna

--- 

![Installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a2f052e3e533cc7f3dc63c5b0f0c056dfe8fa86.png)

In order to install this addon, do the following steps

- locate your Resource pack folder
- copy paste a version of the addon into there
- make a new world and open its datapack folder or find a pre-existing worlds datapack folder
- copy paste a version of the addon there aswell (this is only if you want the regional forms, Zen mode darmanitan, spawning, and bloodmoon ursaluna)

then your done

---

you can support me by supporting my other projects including:

- Errormons (adds missingno)
- Terastalmons (Adds terapagos, and will soon add terastalization)
- Cobbledex (adds the pokedex to the game)
- Ascensions Megamons (Adds mega Evolution to cobblemon)
- Battlebond (Adds Ash-Greninja to the game)

all of which can be found on my profile

You can also support me by joining the server i work for's discord: [https://discord.gg/R83T9MTuWE](https://discord.gg/R83T9MTuWE)

- note that this is not a place to just ask questions about the addon, weve made a addon support channel here for that and i have one in the cobblemon official discord
